en_US: Ah, there was a Pokémon inside my
laptop?! I hope the poor thing’s okay.
Thanks for your help anyway. I have
this disk that I thought might be for
my laptop too, but on second thoughts,
it might be better off with you.
Facade’s a good move for your Pokémon
to have.
Your opponent will think twice about
poisoning or paralyzing your Pokémon.
Inside the laptop...
There appears to be a Pokémon?...
The Pokémon appears as if it will come
out. Want to thump the laptop?
{STRVAR_1 3, 0, 0} thumped the laptop!
ROTOM fled somewhere...
It’s just an ordinary laptop.
My laptop’s been acting up recently...
Could you possibly take a look at it?
I’ll make it worth your while!
